data.body:
FINALIZE PLAN (user-confirmed after /clear). Goal: complete the 5 'remaining to finalize before implementation' items, then run the converged plan through the gate with all overlays. Corpuses for E4 generalization: rebar itself (Python) + ~/snap-oakhart-manual/snap-oakhart-manual (Rails/Ruby) — both have real rebar tickets, giving a polyglot non-DSO held-out set.

PHASES:
1. Registry hardening (cheap): (D) lift prose 'Binary checks (a)(b)..' into structured checklist[] per descriptor; (E) harden structured-output parsing (one T5d run returned empty); (B) route codebase-grounded criteria (T10/T11/T9/COH -> AGENT; G6/A1/E4/G1G2/T3 already AGENT) + add applies_at for proportionate scrutiny. Output: criteria_v7.json; run check_registry_coverage guard.
2. E5 retune (A): add type-aware suppression (test/mechanical RED-GREEN tasks) + raise bar; measure fire-rate before/after.
3. E4 generalization (C): varied ticket sample from rebar + snap; run single-turn suite + agentic slice + overlays under applies_at routing; check routing + criteria behave on a non-DSO population; measure AMBIGUOUS-resolution for newly-AGENT criteria.
4. Additional experiments: validate AGENT-routing decision (single-turn vs agentic AMBIGUOUS->concrete); E6 G6 anti-priming; weak-model/checklist A/B as leverage warrants.
5. Final gate run on epic 5fd2 with ALL overlays (T1-T12 + COH + BROAD + agentic), Opus for consistency.
6. Write up scorecard, update epic STATUS, commit.

Harness: docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/ (harness.py SYSTEM+TOOL; exp1 single-turn+cache; exp2 agentic tool-using; seedpilot recall). venv at $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp/venv (py3.14, anthropic 0.111). Scratch inputs (plans_dso.json/epic.json) survive in tmp.
